User.title: User
User.description: User profile with basic display information

PinnedEvent.title: PinnedEvent
PinnedEvent.description: Information about a combat sports event pinned to a user's calendar

eventId.description: ID of the event from source data

name.description: Name of the event or fight

date.description: Date and time of the event in ISO or UTC format

sport.description: The sports discipline e.g. MMA, BOXING, BJJ, KICKBOXING, WRESTLING

pinnedAt.description: Timestamp when user pinned the event

users/{userId}/pinnedEvents/{eventId}.description: Events pinned to the user's sports calendar
